basics.product_name: Stainless Steel Bakery & Dessert Ambient Display Cabinet with Wooden Interior 560 x 360 x 330 mm
basics.product_tags: Stainless Steel Bakery & Dessert Ambient Display Cabinet with Wooden Interior 560 x 360 x 330 mm, stainless steel bakery display cabinet, wooden interior display cabinet, dessert display cabinet, ambient food display cabinet, acrylic sliding door cabinet, croissant display cabinet, pastry display cabinet, cafe bakery display
basics.description:
Stainless Steel Bakery & Dessert Ambient Display Cabinet with Wooden Interior 560 x 360 x 330 mm is designed for organised ambient presentation of bakery and dessert selections in professional foodservice spaces. Its stainless-steel outer structure provides a clean commercial appearance, while the wooden interior adds warmth to the product presentation and complements breads, pastries and desserts.

The clear acrylic panels improve product visibility, and the acrylic sliding doors allow convenient access during replenishment and service while helping keep the display area neatly enclosed. The cabinet is suitable for presenting croissants, pastries, breads, muffins, cookies, cakes and desserts at normal ambient conditions in cafés, bakeries, hotels, buffet counters and dessert stations.

With dimensions of 560 x 360 x 330 mm, Stainless Steel Bakery & Dessert Ambient Display Cabinet with Wooden Interior 560 x 360 x 330 mm offers a practical combination of durable construction, attractive interior presentation and easy service access. It is well suited to front-counter merchandising, breakfast buffet presentation and everyday bakery display requirements.

Acrylic sliding doors provide convenient service access while keeping breads, croissants, pastries and desserts neatly arranged and clearly visible. Its practical format is suitable for cafés, bakeries, hotels, buffet counters and dessert stations.
